title: Load effects on transport energy
abstract: An example operation includes one or more of providing to a charging station a distance desired to be driven by a transport and determining, by the charging station, an amount of energy to retrieve from the transport such that a residual amount of energy in the transport is equivalent to the distance desired to be driven.
claims: 8. A charging station for a transport, the charging station comprising: a processor that when executing one or more instructions stored in an associated memory is configured to: compare a current energy usage of a transport based on a current weight of the transport to a previous energy usage of the transport; and identify a condition of the transport based on the comparison.
